mermaidSyntax:
graph TD subgraph GEN["🧬 Genomics Pipeline"] G1[WGS Sequencing] --> G2[Variant Calling] G2 --> G3[SNP/Indel Annotation] end subgraph TX["🔬 Transcriptomics Pipeline"] T1[RNA-seq] --> T2[Differential Expression] T2 --> T3[Pathway Enrichment] end subgraph PRO["🧪 Proteomics Pipeline"] P1[Mass Spec] --> P2[Protein Quantification] P2 --> P3[Post-translational Modifications] end G3 --> HUB[Integration Hub] T3 --> HUB P3 --> HUB G3 -.->|Variants inform DE| T2 P3 -.->|PTMs validate findings| T3 subgraph INT["🔗 Integration Hub"] HUB --> MOFA[Multi-omics Factor Analysis
MOFA] HUB --> NET[Network Analysis] HUB --> CAU[Causal Inference] end MOFA --> BIO[Biomarker Discovery] NET --> MEC[Mechanism Insight] CAU --> PUB[Publication] subgraph OUT["📊 Outcomes"] BIO --> B1[Candidate Selection] B1 --> B2[Validation Cohort] B2 --> B3[Clinical Utility] MEC --> M1[Pathway Modeling] M1 --> M2[Drug Target ID] PUB --> P4[Manuscript] P4 --> P5[Peer Review] P5 --> P6[Journal] end B3 -.->|Targeted Validation| G1 B3 -.->|Targeted Validation| T1 B3 -.->|Targeted Validation| P1 classDef genomics fill:#3b82f6,stroke:#1e40af,color:#fff classDef trans fill:#10b981,stroke:#047857,color:#fff classDef prot fill:#8b5cf6,stroke:#6d28d9,color:#fff classDef hub fill:#f59e0b,stroke:#d97706,color:#000 classDef outcome fill:#ec4899,stroke:#be185d,color:#fff class G1,G2,G3 genomics class T1,T2,T3 trans class P1,P2,P3 prot class HUB,MOFA,NET,CAU hub class BIO,MEC,PUB,B1,B2,B3,M1,M2,P4,P5,P6 outcome
